info.name: CMS LCD Coverage Service
info.description:
A unified wrapper around the CMS Local Coverage Determination (LCD) API.

Given a CPT/HCPCS code, returns all coverage data in a single call:
- CPT/HCPCS codes governed by the LCD article
- ICD-10 codes establishing medical necessity
- Modifier codes

**Article ID resolution (automatic):**
The service resolves the article ID for you using a local mapping built from the CMS bulk download (18,370 HCPC code rows, 1,115 articles, last updated Feb 23 2026).
- If the code is in the local mapping → article ID resolved instantly, no extra network call
- If not found locally → falls back to CMS reverse lookup
- If neither finds a match → 404 with a prompt to supply `article_id` directly

`article_id` is now optional for most codes.

variable.description: Base URL of the running service. Change this to point at any environment.

request.description: Basic liveness check. Returns 200 if the service is up.
Shows the current state of the cached CMS Bearer token (expiry, validity, minutes remaining).

item.name: LCD Coverage — No article_id needed
item.description: These requests omit `article_id`. The service resolves it automatically from the local HCPC mapping.

request.description:
Auto-resolves to article 52453 (LHRH Analogs).
Returns 14 CPT/HCPCS codes and 493 ICD-10 medical necessity codes.

No article_id required.

Auto-resolves to article 56416 (first match — 7 articles govern this code).

No article_id required.

Replace `XXXXX` with any CPT/HCPCS code.

The service will:
1. Check the local HCPC→article mapping (4,184 unique codes)
2. If not found, attempt CMS reverse lookup
3. If neither resolves, return 404 — supply article_id directly in that case

item.name: LCD Coverage — article_id override
item.description: Use these when you know the article ID and want to skip the lookup entirely (faster, and useful when a code maps to multiple articles and you need a specific one).

query.description: Pass numeric ID only — no 'A' prefix

request.description:
J9271 is not in the local mapping so article_id must be supplied directly.

Pass the numeric part only (52453, not A52453) — the CMS API rejects the 'A' prefix.

query.description: Override to a specific article when multiple exist

request.description:
82306 maps to 7 different articles. Auto-resolve picks the first (56416).
Use article_id to target a specific one, e.g. 52399.

Template for codes that need a manually specified article ID.

Refer to `article_hcpc_mapping.csv` to find the article ID for any code.

item.name: Bulk Lookup (Collection Runner)
item.description:
Run this folder with Postman's Collection Runner using `article_hcpc_mapping.csv` as the data file to sweep all 18,370 HCPC code rows.

**How to run:**
1. Click the collection name → **Run collection**
2. Select only this folder
3. Under **Data** → **Select File** → choose `article_hcpc_mapping.csv`
4. Set iterations to match row count (18,370) or a smaller sample
5. Click **Run**

**CSV variables available per row:**
- `{{article_id}}` — numeric article ID
- `{{display_id}}` — CMS display ID (e.g. A52453)
- `{{article_title}}` — full article title
- `{{hcpc_code}}` — CPT/HCPCS code
- `{{short_description}}` — brief description
- `{{long_description}}` — full description

item.name: Get Coverage — CSV driven (no article_id param)

query.description: Driven from hcpc_code column in article_hcpc_mapping.csv

request.description:
Article ID is resolved automatically by the service — no need to pass it.

Driven by `article_hcpc_mapping.csv` via Collection Runner.

**Data file:** `article_hcpc_mapping.csv` (CMS bulk download, Feb 23 2026)
**Total articles:** 1,115 | **Total rows:** 18,370
